author: __flcl
content: Want to experiment a bit with transport / app level protocol testing by making a framework that would allow to spawn a node or more and send packets that would test specific cases, execution spec tests like but for networking. The idea of allowing adding lots of tests in easy way by different parties seems very nice. Wdyt guys? There are for sure some test suites for quic and other protocols. But I don't know a common solution to check all protocols we use/need apart from a several of tests in geth devp2p tool. I'd aim 10k of them or so. It might speedup ethp2p development by different clients in part of simpler/faster testing
